heading: Read Preferences
body:
The following table describes the available read preferences for
BI Connector and their corresponding
[readPreference](manual/reference/read-preference) and
[readPreferenceTag](manual/core/read-preference-tags)
connection string options.

| BI Connector Read Preference | Description                 | readPreference | readPreferenceTags                                      |
| ---------------------------- | --------------------------- | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| Primary                      | Read from the primary node. | primary        | None                                                    |
| Secondary                    | Read from secondary nodes.  | secondary      | \{ nodeType : ELECTABLE } or \{ nodeType : READ\_ONLY } |
| Analytics                    | Read from analytics nodes.  | secondary      | \{ nodeType : ANALYTICS }                               |
